buildCommand: cd ../.. && npm run build && npm -w @aiployee/cc-web run build && npx esbuild server/dist/app.js --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node22 --banner:js="import { createRequire as __cr } from 'module'; import { fileURLToPath as __fu } from 'url'; import { dirname as __dn } from 'path'; const require = __cr(import.meta.url); const __filename = __fu(import.meta.url); const __dirname = __dn(__filename);" --outfile=apps/command-centre/api/_app.mjs
